description: Letter from Nissim b. Ḥalfon, from Damsis, to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat. Around 1055. The writer deals with cloths and scarves for Nahray. Also mentions money delivery and asks Nahray to check it, weigh it, and write its account. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #590) VMR
description_he: מכתב מ-Shubrā Damsīs. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
